# Install Acme

Acme is a tool for building things. This page walks you through installation.

## Requirements

You need Node 20+.

<Callout type="warn">Node 18 is no longer supported.</Callout>

## How do I install Acme?

Run `pnpm i acme`.

Then add it to your config.

## Q: Can I use npm?

Yes, `npm i acme` works as well.
